title: Custom photo cake replicas for Rosehill and Camellia birthdays
summary:
A photo reference isn't a suggestion here — it's the design brief. Send the image and our Harris Park kitchen rebuilds it in buttercream, fondant, or ganache, layer by layer.

Rosehill and Camellia families order this most for milestone birthdays, where the design matters more than which of the 15 flavours goes underneath. Photo cake add-on: $19.99, any size from 6-inch to 16-inch.

Every layer is 100% eggless. No exceptions, no substitutions. 48-hour minimum notice — an accurate replica isn't a rush job.

WhatsApp +61 425 697 725. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park, open until 10pm daily.
keywords: cake design matches the reference photo exactly
